name: Corporate League
description: A professional league for employee-led teams representing recognized organizations.
schedule: Weekend matches with a full round-robin format and knockout finals.
rules: Eligibility is verified before the tournament and captain declarations are mandatory.
points: 8 teams, 6 league games, top 4 advance to semis.
awards: Best Batter, Best Bowler, Best All-rounder, Fair Play Trophy

name: Government Services Cup
description: A high-energy competition for government and public sector departments.
schedule: Hosted in a single-day knockout format for fast-paced participation.
rules: All teams must present official department proof during registration.
awards: Spirit of the Game, Best Captain, Most Valuable Player

name: Banking Championship
description: A festival for banking professionals to play with pride and competitive spirit.
schedule: Two-day tournament with league stages and semifinal showdowns.
rules: Only players tied to the registered bank entity are eligible.
points: 10 teams, 2 groups, top 2 from each advance.
awards: Champion Trophy, Rising Star, Team Discipline Award
